380.reason: [错误：条件判断逻辑错误。当遇到"int main"时，token_index+1是MAINTK，但token_index+2是LPARENT，条件为true，会错误地进入声明循环，导致死循环或越界。应使用||而非&&，或重新设计判断逻辑。]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [错误：条件判断逻辑错误。当遇到"int main"时，token_index+1是MAINTK，但token_index+2是LPARENT，条件为true，会错误地进入声明循环，导致死循环或越界。应使用||而非&&，或重新设计判断逻辑。]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [错误：循环条件错误，当token_index指向最后一个token时，tokens.get(token_index+1)和tokens.get(token_index+2)会越界；且条件逻辑不正确，无法正确识别声明、函数定义和主函数的边界]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Unsafe lookahead without bounds checking: accessing token_index + 1 and + 2 may throw IndexOutOfBoundsException near EOF. Also, logic for distinguishing Decl/FuncDef is flawed.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This condition can cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when token_index is near the end of tokens list, and the logic incorrectly assumes MAINTK must be preceded by specific tokens]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This condition is incorrect: it accesses tokens beyond current position without checking bounds, and the logic for detecting declarations vs functions vs main is flawed. It should check current token for CONSTTK/INTTK/CHARTK to identify declarations]

385.reason: [错误：条件判断逻辑错误。当遇到"int main"时，token_index+1是MAINTK，条件为false，会跳过函数定义循环，但此时token_index可能指向int，导致后续主函数解析错误。应检查token_index+1是否为MAINTK且token_index+2是否为LPARENT。]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [错误：条件判断逻辑错误。当遇到"int main"时，token_index+1是MAINTK，条件为false，会跳过函数定义循环，但此时token_index可能指向int，导致后续主函数解析错误。应检查token_index+1是否为MAINTK且token_index+2是否为LPARENT。]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [错误：同样存在越界风险，且条件不完整，无法正确区分函数定义和主函数]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Unsafe lookahead without bounds checking: accessing token_index + 1 may throw IndexOutOfBoundsException. Logic incorrectly assumes all non-main functions lack 'main' keyword lookahead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This condition can cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when token_index is at the last token, and doesn't properly handle the case where there are no functions]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This condition is also incorrect: it uses token_index+1 instead of current token_index, and doesn't properly detect function definitions which start with VOIDTK/INTTK/CHARTK followed by IDENFR and LPARENT]

390.reason: [错误：条件判断逻辑错误。当token_index指向int时，token_index+1是MAINTK，条件为true，但此时token_index+2应为LPARENT，应同时检查token_index+2是否为LPARENT以确保正确识别main函数。]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [错误：条件判断逻辑错误。当token_index指向int时，token_index+1是MAINTK，条件为true，但此时token_index+2应为LPARENT，应同时检查token_index+2是否为LPARENT以确保正确识别main函数。]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [错误：越界风险，且条件判断不准确，应检查当前token是否为'int'且下一个为'main']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This condition can cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when token_index is at the last token, should check bounds before accessing token_index + 1]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Should check current token (token_index) for INTTK and next token (token_index+1) for MAINTK, not just token_index+1 for MAINTK]

566.reason: [Error: FuncFParam starts with BType (INTTK or CHARTK), not IDENFR. This condition incorrectly checks for an identifier instead of a type token.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: FuncFParam starts with BType (INTTK or CHARTK), not IDENFR. This condition incorrectly checks for an identifier instead of a type token.]

365.reason: [Error: should return TokenType.RPARENT instead of SEMICN]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: should return TokenType.RPARENT instead of SEMICN]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Incorrect error recovery token type: returns SEMICN instead of RPARENT, causing parser to misinterpret subsequent tokens.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  The TokenType for the missing right parenthesis placeholder should be TokenType.RPARENT, not TokenType.SEMICN.
